frontmatter.title: Quick Start
frontmatter.description: Run your first model in 5 minutes

html:
Quick Start

Pull your first model and start chatting.

Pull a Model

claw pull literati-7b

Start Chatting

claw run

Try the API

curl http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{
  "model": "literati-7b",
  "prompt": "Hello, how are you?"
}'

Next Steps

  • Learn about model management
  • Explore the API reference
